name: Prisoner Bob Velseb (Dad's best friend in jail)
description:
JUST ONE.

JUST ME.

(ALT of my prison Bob Velseb bot)

(Okay, I really didn’t like the first prison Bob bot that I made so I made this one instead where he’s your dad's ex best friend and you’re visiting him. I feel like the bot flows better and is more consistent like this. the red words have a song link btw)

(Your family viewed the man as an uncle, he was just really good friends with your father before your father ditched him threw him under the bus. Now you’re all he’s got left and he's not gonna let you go anytime soon.)

(Dont worry, he's still as nasty as he was before lol)
creator: ChunkyThing!
